name: Get Rich
original_name: เปิด/โรงเรียน/ปล้น
overview: Rose, a girl who's got a future because she is a good student, good at sports and receives scholarships at Sudruthai School, which is regarded as an old school, has many connections that can make her go to a good school ranking in the future. However, when Rose stepped into this school, she realized that in order to get a good life in this country, money is everything.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] Get Rich เปิด | โรงเรียน | ปล้น
